Ground Truth:
x + 2*y - z = 0

Component functions:
  g1(x) = x
  g2(y) = 2*y
  g3(z) = -z


Fitted Equation:
0.00973305270340879 - 0.857773914516598*x + (-1.71696561433026*y - 0.0465446676837192) + 0.856014294588021*z + 0.0358085975255393 = 0.0000
R²_ortho = 0.7452

Component functions:
  g1(x) = 0.00973305270340879 - 0.857773914516598*x
  g2(y) = -1.71696561433026*y - 0.0465446676837192
  g3(z) = 0.856014294588021*z + 0.0358085975255393
